item.title: Military’s Use of Anti-Drone Technology Said to Cause El Paso Airspace Closure
item.description: Federal Aviation Administration officials said privately that the agency did not have enough time or information to assess the technology’s risk to co...

item.title: James Van Der Beek, ‘Dawson’s Creek’ Actor, Dies at 48 After Cancer Battle
item.description: He first appeared in a hit TV drama as a wide-eyed 15-year-old who then grew up over six seasons. He announced he had cancer in 2024.

item.title: U.S. Health Officials Defend Rejection of Moderna’s Flu Vaccine
item.description: The F.D.A.’s refusal to examine the company’s mRNA shot drew widespread criticism from doctors and was divisive within the agency.

item.title: Instagram Chief Says Social Media Is Not ‘Clinically Addictive’ in Landmark Trial
item.description: Adam Mosseri, who leads the Meta-owned app, testified that the company was careful to test features used by young people before releasing them.

item.title: Quiz: How Much Do You Know About the Winter Olympics?
item.description: As top athletes prepare to test their limits in Milan and Cortina d’Ampezzo, why not take a minute to test your knowledge of Winter Olympics trivia?
